home.latest_reflection_preview: Today I decided to take a longer route through the park. The colors of autumn are finally starting to show...

empty_state.title: Your mind is clear
empty_state.description: Start capturing your thoughts and reflections right now.
empty_state.filtered_description: There are no entries for this specific day.

delete_note.message: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This action cannot be undone.

search.title: Search
search.no_results: No notes found matching your search.

login.slogan: Say goodbye to mental clutter. Start thinking clearly.

note_editor.empty_fields_error: Please fill in both title and description.
note_editor.module_missing: Native module not found. Please ensure you are not using Expo Go and have rebuilt the app.
note_editor.mic_permission_message: Please allow microphone access to use transcription.
note_editor.mic_permission_blocked: Permission is blocked. Please enable it in the system settings.
note_editor.mic_unavailable_message: Speech recognition is not available on this device.

settings.logout_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to sign out?

step1.title: Say goodbye to
step1.description: Embrace the clarity of a quiet mind. Your journey to stillness begins with a single thought.

step2.title: Stay organized
step2.description: Your ideas, synced across all your devices. Never lose a moment of inspiration.

step3.title: Your privacy
step3.description: Encrypted notes and secure access. Your thoughts remain yours and yours alone.

follow_us.title: Follow Us
follow_us.minds_behind: We're the minds behind Nikki. We hope you're enjoying the experience!
follow_us.call_to_action: Feel free to follow us for the latest updates!

data_backup.title: Your Data
data_backup.description: Export your notes to a backup file or restore a previous version.
data_backup.export_description: Creates a JSON file with all your current notes.
data_backup.export_empty: You don't have any notes to export yet.
data_backup.import_description: Load notes from a previously created JSON backup file.
data_backup.import_success_redirect: We will now redirect you to the home page to see your notes.
data_backup.import_error: Invalid file or error during import.
data_backup.import_confirm_message: This might create duplicates if notes already exist. Do you want to continue?
data_backup.sharing_unavailable: Sharing is not available on this device
data_backup.privacy_description: Your backups are local and private. Nikki does not store your notes on external servers unless you set up a sync account.
